name: Eastern Aragonese (Ribagorçan)
notes: Eastern Aragonese / Ribagorçan / Benasquese transition zone. Catalan influence: voiced affricate [dʒ] for Latin G/J before front vowels, possible partial yeísmo. 7-vowel system with /ɛ/ and /ɔ/. Seseo: /θ/ → /s/. Transitional phonology between Aragonese and Catalan, debated classification.
